Title: Successful User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username "testuser" and password "password123".
3. Click the login button.
4. System checks if the user is logged in successfully.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Unsuccessful User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username "wronguser" and password "wrongpass".
3. Click the login button.
4. System checks if the user is logged in successfully.
Expected Result: User remains on the login page with an error message indicating unsuccessful login.

Title: Successful User Registration
Test Data: Valid username: "newuser", valid password: "password123", valid email: "newuser@example.com".
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username "newuser", password "password123", and email "newuser@example.com".
3. Accept the privacy document.
4. Click the register button.
5. System checks if the user is registered successfully.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Unsuccessful User Registration
Test Data: Invalid username: "newuser", invalid password: "pass", invalid email: "invalidemail".
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username "newuser", password "pass", and email "invalidemail".
3. Accept the privacy document.
4. Click the register button.
5. System checks if the user is registered successfully.
Expected Result: User remains on the registration page with an error message indicating unsuccessful registration.

Title: Successful Proposal Exchange Submission
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Submit a new proposal with valid details.
3. System saves the proposal information in the database.
4. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals including the newly submitted proposal.

Title: Unsuccessful Proposal Exchange Submission
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Attempt to submit a new proposal with invalid details.
3. System tries to save the proposal information in the database.
4. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating unsuccessful submission and remains on the proposal exchange page.

Title: View Saved Elements
Preconditions: User is logged in and has saved elements.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the saved elements page.
2. System checks if the user has saved elements.
3. If yes, display the list of saved elements.
Expected Result: User sees the list of saved elements.

Title: Remove Saved Element
Preconditions: User is logged in and has saved elements.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the saved elements page.
2. Select an element to remove.
3. Confirm the removal.
4. System removes the selected element from the database.
5. System checks if the removal was successful.
6. If successful, display the updated list of saved elements.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of saved elements without the removed element.

Title: View Personal Board
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal board page.
2. System checks if data about offers is available.
3. If yes, display the list of offers.
Expected Result: User sees the list of offers.

Title: Insert Offer into Personal Board
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal board page.
2. Insert a new offer with valid details.
3. System checks if the insertion was successful.
4. If successful, display the updated list of offers.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of offers including the newly inserted offer.

Title: Delete Offer from Personal Board
Preconditions: User is logged in and has offers.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal board page.
2. Select an offer to delete.
3. Confirm the deletion.
4. System deletes the selected offer from the database.
5. System checks if the deletion was successful.
6. If successful, display the updated list of offers.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of offers without the deleted offer.

Title: Modify Personal Data Successfully
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal info page.
2. Click on the modify personal info button.
3. Enter new personal data.
4. System saves the new data in the database.
5. System retrieves the updated personal data.
Expected Result: User sees the updated personal data.

Title: Modify Personal Data Unsuccessfully
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal info page.
2. Click on the modify personal info button.
3. Enter invalid personal data.
4. System tries to save the new data in the database.
5. System retrieves the updated personal data.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating unsuccessful modification and remains on the personal info page.

Title: Explore Offers
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the explore offers page.
2. System retrieves the list of offers from the database.
3. System displays the list of offers to the user.
Expected Result: User sees the list of offers.

Title: Filter Offers
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the explore offers page.
2. Apply a filter criterion.
3. System retrieves the filtered list of offers from the database.
4. System displays the filtered list of offers to the user.
Expected Result: User sees the filtered list of offers.

Title: No Offers Available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the explore offers page.
2. System retrieves the list of offers from the database.
3. System displays a message indicating no offers are available.
Expected Result: User sees a message indicating no offers are available.

Title: Accept Proposal
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to accept.
3. Click on the accept button.
4. System updates the proposal status in the database.
5. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals with the accepted proposal marked as accepted.

Title: Reject Proposal
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to reject.
3. Click on the reject button.
4. System updates the proposal status in the database.
5. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals with the rejected proposal marked as rejected.

Title: Cancel Proposal Acceptance
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to accept.
3. Click on the accept button.
4. Cancel the acceptance.
5. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals with the proposal still pending.

Title: Accept Proposal Unsuccessfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to accept.
3. Click on the accept button.
4. System fails to update the proposal status in the database.
5. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating unsuccessful acceptance and remains on the proposal exchange page.

Title: Reject Proposal Unsuccessfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to reject.
3. Click on the reject button.
4. System fails to update the proposal status in the database.
5. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating unsuccessful rejection and remains on the proposal exchange page.

Title: Cancel Proposal Rejection
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to reject.
3. Click on the reject button.
4. Cancel the rejection.
5. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals with the proposal still pending.

Title: Accept Proposal Without Confirmation
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to accept.
3. Click on the accept button without confirming.
4. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals with the proposal still pending.

Title: Reject Proposal Without Confirmation
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to reject.
3. Click on the reject button without confirming.
4. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals with the proposal still pending.

Title: Accept Proposal With Confirmation
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending proposals.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the proposal exchange page.
2. Select a proposal to accept.
3. Click on the accept button and confirm.
4. System updates the proposal status in the database.
5. System retrieves the updated list of proposals.
Expected Result: User sees the updated list of proposals with the accepted proposal marked as accepted.
